top_themes.name: Technical Issues and Glitches
top_themes.explanation: Users report frequent app crashes, frozen screens during critical trading moments, inability to exit positions, incorrect order execution, and data syncing problems. These issues often lead to significant financial losses and frustration, with some users mentioning UI rendering bugs and outdated charts.

top_themes.name: Lack of Features and Functionality
top_themes.explanation: Users are seeking additional features such as flexible loan payment options, extended transaction history, improved watchlist management, broader global market access (beyond US/India), advanced analytical tools (e.g., XIRR, fundamental data), commodity segment trading, and easier account closure processes. Some report removal of previously available functionalities.

top_themes.name: Poor Customer Support
top_themes.explanation: This theme highlights critical dissatisfaction with customer support. Users complain about unresponsiveness, missed callbacks (despite promised short wait times), tickets being closed without resolution, evasive email responses, and general ineffectiveness in addressing urgent financial issues or losses caused by app malfunctions.

top_themes.name: Positive Experiences and Appreciation
top_themes.explanation: Users highly appreciate the app's comprehensive financial features, including net worth tracking, US and Indian stock investments, and mutual funds. Many praise its user-friendly interface for beginners, faster performance after updates, and responsive design team that actively gathers and implements feedback.

user_quotes.quote: guys i have lost a large sum due to the technical issue in app on a specific date, that day was unable to exit my position and i make huge loss & same issue has been accepted by mail, now im asking for refund then they are saying NO we can't initiate for refund Dear be careful while using this app.... good luck

They froze a large sum of my funds from transactions and have been avoiding returning it, sending evasive, poorly written excuses over email. Customer service is terrible, hard to reach by phone, and email responses are slow and drawn out with unnecessary delays. I wouldn’t trust them with my money. Update: Promised my due amount in bank account, instead offering reward points for it.

Whenever there's a loss in MTF bought stocks, the loss is deducted from the wallet but there is no place where we can check what is the total blocked amount against such losses in MTF. Please start showing this blocked amount.

This app is so impressive! It feels like having a personal chartered accountant for all my financial queries and information. Everything is clear, reliable, and easy to access. I’m truly impressed with how helpful and efficient it is!

action_ideas.title: Enhance Core App Stability and Performance
action_ideas.rationale: The highest volume of negative reviews (39, avg. 1.7) centers on critical technical issues, app crashes, and trade execution failures. Prioritizing robust engineering to eliminate these glitches is crucial to prevent user financial losses and rebuild trust.

action_ideas.title: Overhaul Customer Support System
action_ideas.rationale: With the lowest average rating (1.0), poor customer support is severely damaging user confidence. Implement a system for timely callbacks, ensure all tickets are resolved effectively, and improve communication quality, especially for users who have incurred losses due to app issues.

action_ideas.title: Prioritize Key Feature & UX Development
action_ideas.rationale: Users are actively requesting essential financial management features (e.g., XIRR, comprehensive transaction history, more payment options) and improved UX for existing functionalities (e.g., SIP management, watchlist syncing). Addressing these gaps (24 reviews, avg. 2.5) would significantly enhance user satisfaction and competitiveness.
